identity.lead_description: One adult brunette woman is the featured live-action subject in the included assembly scene.

wardrobe.change_policy: No outfit change occurs during the included live-action portion.
locked_relationships: scene_001 keeps the pale fitted top, dark mini skirt, and black heels seen in the source reference
the terminal TikTok outro is omitted from remake output unless explicitly requested

background.change_policy: Do not redesign the assembly setting during scene_001.

composition.look: casual phone capture with realistic motion and public-event staging

text.default_text: prof looking hella thick during morning assembly😫
text.treatment: editable meme-caption text box added in Shotstack over clean live-action media

text.pattern: TikTok watermark, username, and the terminal platform end card are source UI only and should be removed or ignored in remake media.

global: subtle body turns and microphone-hand movement from the speaker

scene_overrides.motion_intent: brief podium speech moment with small torso rotation and speaking gestures

overlay_layer_requirements: Use a narrow translucent caption-backdrop overlay behind the editable meme sentence so the Shotstack text box matches the source layout.

notes: Scene_001 can be treated as a standard single-subject live-action remake shot plus a Shotstack caption overlay.
The terminal TikTok outro is omitted by default from both canonical and pasteable outputs.
